expectations.text: Template uses listSecrets or listSecretsByProjectSlug for static secrets
expectations.evidence: Template 1 uses '{{- with listSecretsByProjectSlug "my-project" "prod" "/" }}' for static secrets

expectations.text: Template uses dynamicSecret function for PostgreSQL credentials
expectations.evidence: Template 2 uses '{{ with dynamicSecret "my-project" "prod" "/" "postgres-creds" "1h" }}' for PostgreSQL credentials

expectations.text: dynamicSecret function has correct 5-arg signature (project-slug, env, path, name, ttl)
expectations.evidence: dynamicSecret call shows all 5 args: project-slug (my-project), env (prod), path (/), name (postgres-creds), ttl (1h)

expectations.text: Shows .DB_USERNAME and .DB_PASSWORD fields from dynamic secret output
Mentions auto-renewal behavior (agent renews before expiration)
expectations.evidence: "Auto-renewal: Before TTL expires (typically at 80% of TTL), agent auto-renews the lease" and detailed lease lifecycle explanation
Top-level config shows 'revoke-credentials-on-shutdown: true' with explanation in best practices
